description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-link

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-link/`
**NOTE:** No index.ts ‚Äî may be incomplete/from PR 175 rescue.

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Existence Check** ‚Äî Complete implementation? Document gaps.
2. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Color, hover color, visited, underline. Dark mode.
3. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. Anchor semantics. External link indicator. New window warning.
4. **Functionality** ‚Äî href, target, rel. External link detection. Download attribute. Disabled state.
5. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`.
6. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. Underline variants. Color states. Focus-ring.
7. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî Must be documented if shipping.
8. **Tests** ‚Äî Navigation. External link. Disabled. ARIA.
9. **Storybook** ‚Äî Internal/external. Disabled. Variants.
10. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî Twig link. Menu items.

### Deliverable
If incomplete: document gaps. If complete: full audit. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-link
